title: Craftable Totem Of Uncleansing
description: Makes the Totem Of Uncleansing from Defile (doctor4t) craftable!
body:
Hello! 

This mod for Minecraft is (a pretty simple one) that makes the Totem Of Uncleansing from doctor4t's mod [Defile ](https://modrinth.com/mod/defile) craftable without [Befoul](https://ko-fi.com/album/Befoul-X8X4RG87N)! (essentially this mod is for broke people like me who cant pay for [Befoul](https://ko-fi.com/album/Befoul-X8X4RG87N) 🥲)

Full credits for [Defile ](https://modrinth.com/mod/defile) go to [These People](https://doctor4t.dev/credits/defile) (go support them! They make really cool mods and stuff!)

The crafting recipe for the Totem Of Uncleansing is:![Crafting recipe for the Totem Of Uncleansing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3807d42b20b733c32246148ad4769814d827505b.png)

If anyone has any concerns like copyright or something like that you can email me at catwithme30@gmail.com

Enjoy! (even though there isnt much _to_ enjoy)
